prose: Frontier orbitals of O₂ computed at DFT tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit, PySCF UKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state). Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz file (single-point; not re-optimized). SCF converged in 7 cycles. Integrity: trustworthy = true, all checks passed. HOMO = −8.8739616 eV, LUMO = −3.5859031 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV (headline value). The HOMO and HOMO−1 are degenerate (both −8.8740 eV), consistent with O₂'s two singly-occupied π* orbitals in the triplet state. Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 8.8739616 eV, vertical EA = 3.5859031 eV, electronegativity = 6.2299323 eV, chemical hardness = 2.6440293 eV, softness = 0.37821064 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity = 7.3395664 eV. No warnings reported.
